examples: Hindu woman married to a Parsi, came to ask for my blessings for her three-year-old son who could not speak.
Nostalgia pervades Parsi clubs, where elderly ladies play rummy in faded English dresses.
As Cyrus the Great was from a Parsi tribe, the name "Persia" was given to the Iranian empire by the Greeks.
